abstract: Accept or reject an incoming XPC connection.
overview:
## Overview

When your browser app calls [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/NetworkingProcess/makeLibXPCConnection()], `BrowserEngineKit` calls this method on your extension, passing the newly created connection as the parameter. To accept the connection, call [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/XPC/xpc_connection_set_event_handler(_:_:)] to install an event handler and listen for incoming messages.

Otherwise, call [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/XPC/xpc_connection_cancel(_:)] to reject the connection.

# handle(xpcConnection:)

**Instance Method**

Accept or reject an incoming XPC connection.

## Declaration

```swift
func handle(xpcConnection: xpc_connection_t)
```

## Parameters

- **xpcConnection**: The inbound connection.

## Overview

When your browser app calls [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/NetworkingProcess/makeLibXPCConnection()], `BrowserEngineKit` calls this method on your extension, passing the newly created connection as the parameter. To accept the connection, call [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/XPC/xpc_connection_set_event_handler(_:_:)] to install an event handler and listen for incoming messages.

Otherwise, call [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/XPC/xpc_connection_cancel(_:)] to reject the connection.
title: handle(xpcConnection:)
